base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of effects — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1991 street fighter ii. Hit-spark + block-spark + Hadouken impact + KO starburst + dust-kick-up. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Hit-spark + block-spark + Hadouken impact + KO starburst + dust-kick-up
